benefits.description: Health dramatically improved, went from barely able to move to taking nothing but peptides and vitamins
Cured ankylosing spondylitis; came off Humira biological therapy

protocol_notes: User followed Dr. Seeds protocol for TA1 at 1.5mg SubQ every third day for a few months. Pinealon stacked with thymus, vessel, and cartilage bioregulators. Started with capsule versions per box directions, then moved to injectable 500mcg/day for 40 days (typical vial). Tops off with another round every 4 months. Also used other bioregulator capsules (thymus, vessel, cartilage). SS-31 did not show noticeable effects. User notes TA1 and SS-31 are FDA-approved for rare diseases. Bioregulators are essentially filtered animal organs (Russian origin, decades of use). Injectable versions are synthetic peptides. Transitioned from barely mobile on Humira to functional on peptides alone.
